headline: What Analyst Projections for Key Metrics Reveal About The Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) Q2 Earnings
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for The Hartford Insurance Group (HIG), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended June 2026.

headline: Travelers: Incredibly Strong Results, Buoyed By The AI Datacenter Boom
summary: The Travelers Companies delivered strong Q2 2026 results, with net income up 46% and a combined ratio of 83.6%. Click here to read this TRV stock update.
